sqlMap.insert: insert into i_information_annotation_t( sendid,informationid,annotationtype,receiveid,content, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) values( $sendid$,$informationid$,$annotationtype$,$receiveid$,'$content$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') select last_insert_id() as id
sqlMap.select:
select * from i_information_annotation_t where 1 = 1
sendid = $sendid$
annotationtype = $annotationtype$
validflag = $validflag$
informationid = $informationid$
order by addtime desc
limit $limit$

select count(id) from i_information_annotation_t where 1 = 1
validflag = $validflag$
annotationtype = $annotationtype$
sendid = $sendid$
informationid = $informationid$
order by addtime desc

select * from i_information_annotation_t where 1 = 1
validflag = $validflag$
annotationtype = $annotationtype$
sendid = $sendid$
informationid = $informationid$
order by addtime desc
select a.*,b.departname as receivename from i_information_annotation_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.receiveid = b.id where a.id = $id$
